tickets.subject: Question about team permissions
tickets.content:
Hi TechCorp Support,

I'm the admin of our team workspace and I'm trying to figure out how to set different permission levels for team members. We have some contractors who should only see specific projects, not everything.

Can you help me understand:
1. How do I create custom permission levels?
2. Can I restrict access to specific boards only?
3. Is there a way to see who accessed what?

Thanks in advance!

Best,
Sarah

tickets.subject: Integration with GitHub not working
tickets.content:
Hello,

We purchased the Business plan specifically for the GitHub integration feature. However, when I try to connect our GitHub organization, I keep getting an error: 'Authorization failed - please check your permissions'.

I've already:
- Reconnected the integration 3 times
- Made sure I'm admin on both TechCorp and GitHub
- Cleared browser cache

This is blocking our entire workflow. Please help urgently.

Regards,
Mike Chen
CTO, GlobalCorp

tickets.subject: Enterprise pricing inquiry
tickets.content:
Dear TechCorp Team,

We are a company of 500+ employees and are evaluating your platform for organization-wide deployment.

Could you please provide:
1. Enterprise pricing details
2. Volume discounts for annual commitment
3. SLA guarantees
4. Dedicated support options

We're also looking at Asana and Monday.com, so competitive pricing would be appreciated.

Best regards,
David Park
VP of Operations, Acme Industries

tickets.subject: Feature request: Dark mode please!
tickets.content:
Hi there!

Love your product! We've been using TechCorp for 6 months and it's transformed how our design team collaborates.

One request: Any chance of getting a dark mode soon? My eyes hurt after long design sessions 😅

Also, the AI summarization feature is incredible - saved me hours every week!

Keep up the great work!

Emma

tickets.subject: DEMAND FULL REFUND - Your product is broken
tickets.content:
THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE!

I've been charged $228 for the annual Business plan and YOUR PRODUCT DOESN'T EVEN WORK HALF THE TIME!

The AI summaries are WRONG, the integrations CRASH constantly, and I've LOST IMPORTANT DATA because of your bugs.

I want a FULL REFUND immediately or I'm taking legal action. This is false advertising and I've wasted countless hours on this garbage.

FIX THIS OR I'M SUEING.

Robert Thompson

tickets.subject: Non-profit discount availability?
tickets.content:
Hello TechCorp Team,

I run a small non-profit organization and we're interested in using your platform for our volunteer coordination.

Do you offer any discounts for registered 501(c)(3) organizations? We have about 25 volunteers who would need access.

Thank you!
Lisa

tickets.subject: API rate limits documentation
tickets.content:
Hi Support,

I'm building a custom integration using your REST API but I can't find clear documentation on rate limits.

What are the current rate limits for:
- API calls per minute
- Webhook deliveries
- Bulk operations

Also, is there a way to request higher limits for enterprise customers?

Thanks,
James Kim
Senior Developer

tickets.subject: Re: Previous ticket #45892 - Still unresolved
tickets.content:
Hi,

I'm following up on my previous ticket about the Google Drive sync issue. It's been 5 days and the problem persists.

Our team of 50 people cannot access shared documents reliably. This is affecting our daily operations.

Can someone please provide:
1. A status update
2. Expected resolution time
3. Workaround if available

This is becoming critical.

Anna Kowalski
IT Director

tickets.subject: How to export all my data?
tickets.content:
Hello,

I'm considering switching to another platform and need to know: how do I export all my data from TechCorp?

Specifically:
- All my tasks and boards
- Documents and wiki pages
- Comments and attachments

Is there a bulk export feature? What formats are supported?

Thanks,
Tom

tickets.subject: Thank you for the excellent support!
tickets.content:
Hi TechCorp!

Just wanted to say thank you to your support team. Had an issue last week with workspace permissions and it was resolved within hours.

The step-by-step guide your agent provided was clear and worked perfectly. This is why we love TechCorp!

Keep doing what you're doing! 🎉

Best,
Jennifer Lee
COO, HappyCustomer Co
Hey! Quick question - how do I add someone to my workspace? 🤔

Love the new update! The dark theme is exactly what I needed 🎨✨

tickets.subject: Kanban board customization options
tickets.content: Hi, I'm trying to customize our Kanban boards to match our workflow. Can I create custom column types beyond the default To Do / In Progress / Done? Also, can I add custom fields to tasks?

tickets.subject: Cannot login after password reset
tickets.content: I requested a password reset 2 hours ago and still haven't received the email. I've checked spam folder. My email is diana.prince@startuplab.io. This is urgent as I have a presentation in 30 minutes!

tickets.subject: SSO integration for enterprise
tickets.content: We need to set up Single Sign-On (SSO) with our Azure AD. Is this available on the Business plan or do we need Enterprise? What's the setup process?

tickets.subject: Student/Educator discount program
tickets.content: I'm a computer science teacher and would like to use TechCorp for my class projects. Do you offer educational discounts? We have about 40 students per semester.

tickets.subject: Mobile app offline mode
tickets.content: Does the mobile app support offline mode? Our field teams often work in areas with poor connectivity. They need to be able to view and update tasks offline, with sync when connection is restored.

tickets.subject: Attachment storage limits
tickets.content: What are the file attachment limits per plan? We're a design team and regularly upload large PSD and AI files. Will we run into storage issues on the Pro plan?

tickets.subject: Security compliance certifications
tickets.content: Our organization requires vendors to have SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications. Does TechCorp have these? Also, is data encrypted at rest and in transit?
